name: Herbed Oven "Fried" Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 pounds Skinned & boned chicken breasts, cut into 1-inch wide strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the crumb mixture and seasonings; dip each chicken strip in water first, then coat with crumbs pressing gently to ensure they adhere well.
2. Spray a nonstick baking sheet with non-stick cooking spray. Arrange the coated chicken strips on the sheet and sprinkle evenly with remaining crumb mixture.
3. Bake at 350°F until tender, about 20 minutes per serving.
